parameters.name: grad
parameters.desc: Surface downwelling shortwave is the sum of direct and diffuse solar radiation incident on the surface, and is sometimes called global radiation

parameters.name: mnt2m
parameters.long_name: minimum 2m temperature in the last forecast period
parameters.desc: Minimum 2m temperature in the last forecast intervall

parameters.name: mxt2m
parameters.long_name: maximum 2m temperature in the last forecast period
parameters.desc: Maximum 2m temperature in the last forecast intervall

parameters.name: rain_acc
parameters.desc: Accumulated total amount of rainfall since start of the forecast

parameters.name: rr_acc
parameters.desc: Accumulated total amount of liquid and solid precipitation since start of the forecast

parameters.name: snow_acc
parameters.desc: Total snowfall amount since start of forecast

parameters.name: snowlmt
parameters.desc: Height above ground where falling snow melts

parameters.name: sy
parameters.desc: Codes for GeoSphere Austria weather symbol.

parameters.long_name: u component of maximum wind gust
parameters.desc: U component of maximum wind gust in the last forecast intervall

parameters.name: v10m
